result:
Done. Here's what changed:

**`tests/fixtures/live-process.ts`** — added `environmentFailedUpsertLiveFixture` (seq 19, `failedEnvironmentFixture` — plain preparation failure, no checkpoint result).

**`tests/service/client/process-live.test.ts`** — four Story 2 TCs are now explicit and semantically precise:

| TC | Scenario | What changed |
|----|----------|-------------|
| TC-2.3a | hydration progress visible | No change (was already correct) |
| TC-2.3b | hydration failure visible | Now uses plain `failedEnvironmentFixture` (not checkpoint failure); asserts `state: 'failed'`, `blockedReason` contains "Preparation failed", `lastCheckpointResult: null` |
| TC-2.4a | running only after readiness | Now a three-step sequence: `preparing → ready → running` with intermediate state assertions |
| TC-2.4b | running doesn't appear after failed preparation | Now sequential `preparing → failed` using the plain failure fixture; explicitly asserts `state !== 'running'` |

19/19 pass. Lint clean.
